data.title: Performance Brokerage Services to attend & speak at 2026 Boating Industry Elevate Summit in Lake Buena Vista, Florida.
data.description: A leading dealership buy-sell entity, Performance Brokerage Services, disclosed that its Marine Division has confirmed participation and speaking engagement at the 2026 Boating Industry Elevate Summit scheduled from January 18 to 20 in Lake Buena Vista, Florida. The event will take place in IRVINE, California, and is set to gather industry professionals and experts for insightful discussions and networking opportunities. Performance Brokerage Services continues to display dominance in dealership transactions and ventures, showcasing expertise in the sector.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services to speak at 2026 Powersports Business Accelerate Conference in Florida. Dates: Jan 18-20.
data.description: Performance Brokerage Services, a prominent player in dealership acquisitions, has revealed that its Powersports Division is set to participate in and make an appearance at the 2026 Powersports Business Accelerate Conference. The event is scheduled to take place from January 18 to 20 in Lake Buena Vista, Florida. The company, based in Irvine, California, made this announcement on January 15, 2026.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services will be speaking at the 2026 AED Summit in Dallas, Texas on January 19-21.
data.description: A prominent dealership buy-sell activity company, Performance Brokerage Services, recently disclosed that its Equipment & Commercial Truck Division is set to participate and present at the AED Summit in Dallas, Texas from January 19 to 21, 2026. The event will take place in Irvine, Calif., and serves as a notable platform for industry professionals. Performance Brokerage Services aims to showcase its expertise and engage with attendees at this important gathering.

data.title: Kavalan unveils 2026 Lunar New Year Exclusive: Golden Steed & Peonies whisky gift set. Tribute to Year of the Horse.
data.description: Celebrating the Year of the Horse, Kavalan, the renowned whisky distillery in Taiwan, has launched a special edition for the 2026 Lunar New Year named Golden Steed & Peonies. This exclusive release showcases symbolic artistry and the distinctive complexity of their single malt whisky. Limited in availability, this tribute to the year is set to captivate enthusiasts.

data.title: Thredd partners with Paywith for next-gen card programs in Australia, combining expertise for flexible launches.
data.description: In Sydney today, it was announced that Thredd, a prominent global payments processor, has successfully launched its initial program in collaboration with Paywith, a top payment orchestration platform. This partnership merges Paywith's payment orchestration technology with Thredd's local market knowledge and adaptable infrastructure, empowering businesses to efficiently introduce versatile, customer-focused card programs swiftly and assuredly. The program already active on Thredd's platform provides support for various...

data.title: SAP and Syngenta partner to scale AI in agriculture, aiming to boost innovation globally.
data.description: A collaboration has been unveiled between SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) and Syngenta, a prominent player in agricultural innovation, headquartered in Basel, Switzerland, and Walldorf, Germany. This newly announced multi-year strategic partnership aims to advance AI-assisted innovation within Syngenta’s worldwide operations. The strategic alliance intends to integrate artificial intelligence significantly within Syngenta’s operations to revamp processes and facilitate expeditious innovation through cutting-edge data analytics. This initiative will span various sectors of the business, including manufacturing and supply chain.

data.title: NTT DATA named Global Top Employer for third year in a row by Top Employers Institute, only 17 companies recognized.
data.description: NTT DATA, a renowned company specializing in AI, digital business, and technology services, has been designated as a Global Top Employer for 2026 by the Top Employers Institute in Tokyo. This marks the third consecutive year that NTT DATA has received this accolade, distinguishing the company as one of only 17 organizations globally to achieve this recognition for its exceptional people strategy implementation. Apart from the global acknowledgment, NTT DATA has also achieved success in specific regions, with significant accomplishments.

data.title: 8 industry leaders will showcase end-to-end critical connectivity at ISE Barcelona 2026, Europe's largest AV tradeshow.
data.description: In Waterloo, Ontario, a major collaboration has been announced among eight top technology companies to present a live-integrated showcase at ISE Barcelona 2026, which is recognized as Europe's prime audiovisual and systems integration tradeshow. This groundbreaking partnership involves Alfalite, Brainstorm, Dejero, Domo Broadcast Systems, FOR-A, KitPlus, Ontario Soluciones, and RGB Spectrum. Together, they will demonstrate the pioneering end-to-end critical connectivity ecosystem at the event. This initiative marks a significant milestone showcasing unparalleled technology integration and innovation.

data.title: Popular KODANSHA TITLES available exclusively on MangaPlaza, including The Maid’s Three-Star Cuisine and Nanatsu-ya: Shinobu.
data.description: Newly released KODANSHA titles originating from Japan are now exclusively available on MangaPlaza.

data.title: Jan 15, 2026: UAB Merko Statyba and Lithuanian Ministry of Defence signed two PPP contracts for Parts B and C of Rūdninkai Defence Force Campus.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, UAB Merko Statyba, a division of AS Merko Ehitus, partnered with the Lithuanian Ministry of Defence for two distinct public-private partnership (PPP) agreements. These contracts involve the development and building of Parts B and C of the Rūdninkai Defence Force Campus. Furthermore, UAB Merko Statyba will also provide maintenance services throughout the contract duration.
US AMB. TO BELGIUM WHITE: WORKING ON $50B LNG DEAL WITH BELGIUM – BTV

data.title: RF Industries' stock surges nearly 21% post Q4 fiscal 2025 earnings release, with net sales up 23% to $22.7 million.
data.description: RF Industries Ltd. saw a significant increase in their shares by 20.94% in after-hours trading, reaching $8.72, following the release of their fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 earnings. The San Diego-based company reported a 23% rise in net sales for Q4, totaling $22.7 million, compared to $18.5 million in the previous year and $19.8 million in the third quarter of fiscal 2025. The company also revealed a consolidated net income of $174,000, or $0.02 per diluted share, contrasting with a net loss of $238,000, or $0.02 per diluted share, in the same quarter of the prior year. Additionally, RF Industries disclosed a non-GAAP net income of $2.1 million, equivalent to 20 cents per diluted share.

data.title: Nasdaq falls 1% as tech stocks decline; Fear & Greed Index at 'Neutral' zone. Chip stocks like AVGO, NVDA, and MU take hit. Markets cautious pre-Trump tariffs ruling. Bank of America Corp & Citigroup Inc report earnings.
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a decrease in overall market sentiment, shifting to the "Neutral" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks saw a decline, particularly the Nasdaq Composite which dropped by 1% as investors exercised caution regarding an upcoming Supreme Court ruling on the legality of President Donald Trump's tariffs. Chip stocks experienced significant drops, with Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO), Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA), and Micron Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: MU) all closing lower on Wednesday. Additionally, Bank of America Corp. (NYSE: BAC) and Citigroup Inc. reported earnings for the day. Please refer to Benzinga.com for more detailed information.

data.title: At CES 2026, Tineco shines as a top smart home brand with innovative cleaning solutions, showcasing leading evolution in home cleaning.
data.description: During CES 2026, Tineco, a prominent brand in the home cleaning sector, stood out by emphasizing its intelligent cleaning solutions that blend design, performance, and practicality. This approach has solidified Tineco's position as a leader in redefining home cleaning standards, garnering various accolades. The brand's innovative products were showcased at CES, underscoring its commitment to seamlessly integrating advanced technologies into households.
